{{R|Radiant Pearl||2}} is an {{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:Ancient|Ancient|2}} {{2|Relics|Relic}}. At the start of each combat, it adds 1 {{C|Luminesce||2}} into your Hand.

== Sources ==
Can be offered at the start of [[StS2:Acts#Act 2|Act 2]] by {{KW|Orobas||2}}.
